column1: # Average household size by African country.
# Source: UN Database on Household Size and Composition
#         Original data: UN DESA Population Division
# See: UN (2022) "Household Size and Composition Around the World"
# Rationale: Household members form the core close-contact network.
# that total daily close contacts are approximately 2x household size:
# household members plus a similar number of regular out-of-household
# produces avg_contacts in the range 6-20 across African countries
# consistent with the Prem et al. projected contact matrices for Africa.
#   Prem K et al. (2017) "Projecting social contact matrices in 152 countries"
#   Prem K et al. (2021) "Projecting contact matrices in 177 geographical regions"
# Countries without data use the Sub-Saharan Africa median (~5.0).
